## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] docs
- [ ] test
- [ ] chore

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] I ran `npm test`
- [ ] I added/updated tests where needed
- [ ] I updated docs/config examples where needed
- [ ] I considered security and failure paths

## Validation Notes

Provide key outputs or brief notes proving the change works.

## Related Issues

Link issues, for example: `Closes #123`
